channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Fuel price hike unlikely to stoke inflation
item.description:
Importance: 94.8 | Covered by: 9 feeds | Reputation: 9.6

Matched titles:
- Fuel price hikes feed inflation but ease subsidy burden
- Inflation would not rise much for fuel-price hike
- Commerce Minister explains why fuel price hike ‘won’t significantly raise inflation’
- True cost of fuel price hike
- Fuel price hike in Bangladesh ‘modest’, unlikely to drive inflation: Muktadir
- Inflation won’t rise significantly despite the increase in fuel prices: Commerce minister
- Commerce minister plays down inflation risk after fuel hike
- Inflation not to rise as sharply as feared as fuel price hikes remain modest: commerce minister
- Fuel price hike ‘modest’, unlikely to accelerate inflation: Muktadir
- Hiked fuel prices unlikely to significantly push inflation up: Muktadir
- Fuel price increase ‘moderate’, unlikely to cause inflation: Commerce minister
- Fuel price hike not responsible for inflation: Commerce minister
- Fuel price hike: Commerce Minister downplays inflation risks
- Fuel price hike in Bangladesh despite global decline raises inflation fears
